memoryArtifacts.headline: A Brief History
memoryArtifacts.description: RALPH de CLAYTON was born about 1260, the second son, but inherited the Manor.

zh.Thelwall, Chester, England: 英國英格蘭爾瑟爾瓦爾
zh.Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 伍茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Clayton於1260年出生在英國藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 伍茲時，他的父親John de Clayton II30歲，母親Ruth de Latham20歲。他和Mrs. Sarah de Clayton至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1325年在英國藍卡爾利藍德享年65歲。

zh-hans.Thelwall, Chester, England: 英国英格兰爾瑟爾瓦爾
zh-hans.Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 伍茲
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Clayton于1260年出生在英国藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 伍茲时，他的父亲John de Clayton II30岁，母亲Ruth de Latham20岁。他和Mrs. Sarah de Clayton至少有6个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1325年在英国藍卡爾利藍德享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clayton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places, in Yorkshire, Lancashire, Staffordshire, and Sussex, named Clayton, from Old English clǣg ‘clay’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cleeton
meanings: English (Shropshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Clayton  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Clayton was born in 1260, in Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England, his father, John de Clayton II, was 30 and his mother, Ruth de Latham, was 20. He had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Mrs. Sarah de Clayton. He died in 1325, in Leyland, Lancashire, England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Clayton est né en 1260, à Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John de Clayton II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ruth de Latham, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Mrs. Sarah de Clayton. Il est décédé en 1325, à Leyland, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Clayton 1260 in Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Clayton II 30 und seine Mutter Ruth de Latham 20. Er hatte mit Mrs. Sarah de Clayton mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1325 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Leyland, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Clayton è nato il nel 1260 nel Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, John de Clayton II, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Ruth de Latham, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Mrs. Sarah de Clayton. Morì nel 1325, nel Leyland, Lancashire, England, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Claytonが1260年にイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトン ル ウッドスで生まれた時，父John de Clayton IIは30歳，母Ruth de Lathamは20歳であった。彼はMrs. Sarah de Claytonとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1325年にイギリスランカシュアイアリーランドで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Clayton(이)가 1260년 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴 일 우드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Clayton II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Ruth de Latham(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Mrs. Sarah de Clayton(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1325년 영국 랭카실르 리랜드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Thelwall, Chester, England: Thelwall, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Clayton nasceu em 1260, em Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Clayton II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ruth de Latham, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Mrs. Sarah de Clayton. Ele faleceu em 1325, em Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Clayton родился в 1260 г. в местности клеитон л вудс, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Clayton II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ruth de Latham, 20. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Mrs. Sarah de Clayton. Он умер в 1325 г. в местности лиланд, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Clayton nació en 1260, en Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Clayton II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Ruth de Latham, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Mrs. Sarah de Clayton. Murió en 1325, en Leyland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años.
